title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
